news.Title: 三星證券看好韓股長線潛力 建議善用節稅帳戶布局資產
news.Content:
商傳媒 ｜吳承岳／台北報導

儘管全球金融市場波動加劇，韓國股市長期投資價值依然受到市場看好。三星證券（Samsung Securities）近日表示，對於著眼長期報酬的投資人而言，韓股仍具備基本面優勢，建議透過政府提供的節稅帳戶，採取定期、長期的投資策略，穩健累積資產。根據韓國《每日經濟》報導，三星證券頻道解決方案策略團隊主管指出，市場短期震盪屬於投資過程中的正常現象，不應因此改變長期投資規劃。對有意布局韓國市場的投資人來說，善用節稅帳戶不僅可降低投資成本，也有助於提升長期報酬率。所謂節稅帳戶，是政府為鼓勵民眾投資或儲蓄所設立的優惠制度，投資收益可享有免稅、減稅或延後課稅等優惠，讓資產在複利效果下持續增值。三星證券認為，在全球資金持續關注人工智慧（AI）、半導體及高科技產業的趨勢下，韓國企業仍具備良好的成長動能，因此對韓股後市維持正向看法。對於有意布局海外市場的台灣投資人而言，除了關注市場波動，也可從長期投資、資產配置及稅務規劃等角度思考，建立更穩健的投資策略。

【提醒您】投資有賺有賠，本文僅供參考，不構成投資建議。

news.Title: 台積電現在能買進？專家曝3奈米、2奈米大利多 示警這事藏變數
news.Content:
台股今（7）日終場重挫逾千點，一舉失守46K大關，權王台積電尾盤翻黑，下跌20元，收在2440元，隨著股價震盪，市場也持續關注台積電是否仍具備長期投資價值。《The Motley Fool》分析師Rick Orford指出，受惠於先進製程價格調漲，台積電未來獲利成長動能仍相當強勁，不過，股價已累積不小漲幅，加上美國專利訴訟仍存在不確定性的情況下，投資人仍須審慎評估風險。

Rick Orford表示，台積電目前仍穩居全球晶圓代工龍頭，為蘋果、輝達、超微、博通及高通等科技大廠生產先進晶片。截至2026年第一季，台積電全球晶圓代工市占率已接近72%，持續大幅領先競爭對手三星電子。除了3奈米製程已穩定量產，2奈米製程也正式投產，升級版N2P製程預計將於今年下半年推出，可望持續滿足AI、高效能運算（HPC）及智慧型手機等高階晶片需求。

Rick Orford認為，台積電未來最大的成長契機，在於持續提升先進製程的定價能力，今年3奈米晶圓代工價格最高調漲約15%，2奈米晶圓每片報價更接近3萬美元，創下歷史新高。

獲利新引擎啟動

由於台積電先進製程產能幾乎滿載、客戶需求依舊強勁，價格調升並未影響接單，反而可望帶動毛利率與獲利同步提升。市場預估，若先進製程全面反映新價格，可望為台積電增加數十億美元營收，並推升每股盈餘（EPS）約10%至15%。

然而，Rick Orford也提醒，投資人仍需留意潛在風險。除了地緣政治因素外，美國專利訴訟也是市場關注焦點。若最終裁決不利，理論上可能影響部分先進晶片在美國市場的銷售。

美國專利戰恐成變數

根據《Axios》日前報導，愛爾蘭專利授權公司Longitude Licensing與Marlin Semiconductor已共同向美國國際貿易委員會（ITC）提出申訴，指控台積電利用先進製程生產的晶片侵犯其專利權，涉及AI加速器晶片的關鍵技術。對此，台積電回應，公司在全球所有營運據點均遵循相關法律規範。

經濟部智慧財產局長廖承威則表示，提告台積電的兩家公司屬於業界俗稱的「專利蟑螂」。他指出，台積電過去在專利檢索及侵權訴訟方面經驗豐富，且勝訴紀錄良好，對其處理能力深具信心；目前台積電也已向美國專利商標局（USPTO）提出專利無效挑戰，希望藉此化解相關爭議。

市場分析普遍也認為，此類專利訴訟多半最終以和解收場，全面禁止相關晶片進口美國的可能性並不高。

news.Title: Nigeria to investigate tech firms over news content use
news.Content: By Tife Owolabi LAGOS, July 7 (Reuters) - Nigerian President Bola Tinubu has directed the country's competition regulator to investigate major technology companies ‌over alleged anti-competitive practices and unauthorised use of news content, ...
news.AI_Summary:
• Nigeria's President has ordered an investigation into major tech firms, including Meta and Alphabet, for alleged anti-competitive practices and unauthorized use of news content.
• The inquiry, led by the Federal Competition and Consumer Protection Commission (FCCPC), will examine market dominance, use of copyrighted content for AI training, and monetization of journalistic material.
• This investigation could set a precedent for regulating global digital platforms in Africa, similar to actions taken in South Africa, France, Australia, and Canada.
• Regulators worldwide are examining whether tech companies should compensate publishers for content used to train AI or generate revenue.
• Companies like Meta, Alphabet, and X did not immediately respond to requests for comment.
news.Keywords: tech regulation, news content, anti-competitive practices, AI training data, digital platforms

news.Title: 台股跌千點能接刀？ 專家喊「53000沒問題」：抄底買點在這天
news.Content:
大盤狂瀉1077點跌破月線引發市場恐慌，分析師周代運在臉書發文表示，強調這並非利空來襲，而是單純「漲多了」的健康回檔，並重申大盤波段目標上看53000點的預測完全沒有問題。他指出，目前量能萎縮並非放量重殺，主要是洗淨追高浮額，預計短線還需壓低整理一天，待回測10日線且量縮時，才是標準的抄底時機。

台股大跌非利空單純漲多了

台股今天為什麼會跌？前國際大通投顧研究部副總周代運表示，根本不是什麼利空，就是單純漲多了。指數連拉一周，離5日線乖離拉到快2%，前高附近本來就卡了一堆套牢解套單，外資順手在期貨端加點空單調節，投信順勢做個價差洗浮額。量能是縮的，不是放量重殺。這就叫健康回檔，把追高的韭菜洗乾淨，後面拉起來才輕鬆。

三面支撐53000點非空話

周代運表示，很多人質疑53000是不是喊空話。坦白講，如果是10萬點，我覺得還有點太虛，但是，53000點基本上沒有問題。

基本面： AI伺服器訂單排到2027年底，台積電3nm、2nm產能全滿，整個半導體供應鏈第三季獲利還要再修高。今年上市櫃整體EPS成長率市場共識25%起跳，現在本益比離歷史高點還有一大段，根本沒到泡沫的程度。

技術面： 這波是年初啟動的主升段，不論是波浪測幅還是型態滿足點，53000都是最基本的波段目標。季線仰角沒變，多頭趨勢就沒破。

籌碼面： 更不用怕，外資這波是短線獲利了結，不是反手佈空。本土壽險、投信的資金還在慢慢進場，承接力道夠，跌不深。

兩天後看準2大指標抄底

台股短線怎麼走？周代運分析，今天只是第一天回檔，明天還有一天要壓。不要急著現在衝進去接飛刀，也別嚇到亂砍在最低點，更別手癢歐印接半山腰。早一天進場，可能多扛3%，完全沒必要。大概兩天後，指數回測10日線附近、量縮到今天的8成左右，就是標準的抄底訊號。

鎖定三檔AI核心主線

周代運建議三檔可以緊盯回檔的標的，都是這波AI主線的核心，拉回就是撿便宜的好機會。

（封面示意圖/AI生成）

news.Title: 〈陸股盤後〉「川習會」可望9月底登場 市場未領情 三大指數走低
news.Content:
中國 A 股三大指數 7 日（周二）走低，美國總統川普 6 日表示，預定 9 月 24 日前後在美國與中國國家主席習近平見面，但市場並未領情。

上證指數 7 日收報 3,990.24 點，跌 1.26%。深證成指收報 15,225.11 點，跌 1.24%。創業板指收報 3,911.91 點，跌 0.94%。

川普在白宮活動中談及興建大型宴會廳計畫時，提到習近平可能來訪的安排。他表示，白宮需要一間更大的宴會廳，以便接待習近平等外國元首。

川普說：「例如，習近平主席將在 9 月底左右來到這裡，我相信是 9 月 24 日前後。我們需要一間大型宴會廳，才能容納數千人，每個人都想見他。」

若依川普透露的時間規劃，習近平訪美行程將與一年一度的聯合國大會高層周相互銜接。川普預計於 9 月 22 日在聯合國大會發表演說，並依慣例在紐約停留數日，與多國領袖舉行雙邊會談。習近平自 2012 年上任以來，僅出席過一次聯合國大會。

川普先前曾表示，希望於 9 月接待習近平訪美，此次是首度提出較明確時間點。不過，目前白宮與中國官方尚未正式公布訪問安排。

川普與習近平今年 5 月曾在北京舉行備受矚目的高峰會，雙方尋求在伊朗戰事引發緊張局勢後，進一步穩定兩國關係。

儘管美中近期持續改善雙邊互動，並在經貿領域取得部分進展，但雙方仍面臨多項敏感議題，包括中東局勢、台灣問題，以及川普持續推動的關稅政策。

news.Title: 台股2大原因突重挫千點！短線沒站回「壓力點位」就慘了
news.Content:
台股今（7日）劇烈震盪，早盤一度上漲超過400點，但午盤賣壓沉重，翻黑下殺後重挫超過千點，讓不少投資人相當困惑。法人認為，除了受到亞股走弱，市場追價信心不足，形成去槓桿「多殺多」現象，短期內仍必須觀察權值股動向，大盤能否快速站回月線將是關鍵。

台股一口氣失守46000點關卡，10日線約46057點及月線45710點，最低觸及45432.02點，收盤為45479.11點，高低震盪達1535點。台股盤面綠油油，逾千家收跌，熱門族群及權值股全面失守，僅大型金控股撐盤，交投情緒驟變。

法人認為，短期需要觀察台股能否快速站回月線，若無力止跌恐面臨更長期的盤整，甚至劇烈下探的壓力，此時權值股的狀況將是重點。台積電今日一路苦撐，但尾盤翻黑，最終下跌20元收在最低的2440元。

永豐期貨認為，急殺逼出融資清洗壓力，市場情緒明顯朝空方傾斜。恐慌情緒蔓延下，短線盤勢進入籌碼重組的時刻。此時與其過早猜測底部、盲目承接強勢股的拉回修正，投資人應退場觀望，靜待主流高價股止跌及籌碼沉澱。

三大法人合計賣超946.91億元，外資及陸資賣超547.31億元，自營商賣超487.33億元，投信買超87.73億元，外資持續將資金轉往美元資產，新台幣兌美元突破32元關卡後，今日續貶逾1角。

外資上周賣超1392.99億元，本周續站賣方，兩天已狂砍802.35億元，觀察是否有台積電法說會行情，否則資金出現輪動後會傾向低基期、防禦性及基本面良好的族群。

However, these gains haven't been earned without bouts of historic volatility and periods of heightened uncertainty. Missed ...

news.Title: 外資大舉提款、台股挫跌拖累，新台幣週二重貶1.18角連五跌
news.Content:
【財訊快報／劉敏夫】台北外匯市場週二新台幣兌美元匯價走貶。星幣、泰銖除外主要亞洲貨幣週二普升，週一摜破32元價位的台幣連五跌、表現相對落後，與此同時，台股週二走勢踉蹌，加權指數挫跌2.31%，外資賣超上市股票547.31億元，近四日賣超逾2,470億元，也令台幣承壓。新台幣兌美元匯率週二以32.143元作收，與前一交易日比較，台幣匯率大貶1.18角。銀行間新台幣兌美元最高成交價為32.030元，最低成交價為32.176元，成交量為19億4,600萬美元。

根據兩位外匯交易員表示，近幾日與台灣央行在溝通大額美元賣單時，遇到央行要求當天賣完的情況。不過，央行並未解釋相關指引的原因。這與以往台幣升勢較大時，央行要求分散多天賣出甚至駁回的情況不同。

此外，台灣央行外匯局局長蔡烱民週一於記者會上表示，7月及8月進入股利發放季節，今年的整體股利金額略多一些，外資拿到後可能匯出，但也可能留在台股持續投資。

9月份聯邦公開市場委員會(FOMC)會議不動的機率還是比較大，因為商品通膨已有放緩，且美國就業市場比較緩和，若美元走勢不再那麼強，市場賣匯意願會大一點。

news.Title: SpaceX Is Joining the Nasdaq-100 This Week. What This Means for Invesco QQQ Investors.
news.Content: Space Exploration Technologies (NASDAQ: SPCX), otherwise known as SpaceX, is joining the Nasdaq-100 index today. This means that exchange-traded funds (ETFs) tracking the index, including the Invesco QQQ Trust (NASDAQ: QQQ), will soon own the stock indirectly. J.P. Morgan, part of JPMorgan Chase , expects this index inclusion to trigger about $4.3 billion in passive buying from index-tracking funds. Although this will serve as a clear near-term demand catalyst for SpaceX, Invesco QQQ Trust investors are also getting exposure to a founder-controlled company with a limited number of publicly traded shares (float) and an unprofitable business. Missed Nvidia in 2009? ...
news.AI_Summary:
• SpaceX is joining the Nasdaq-100 index, which will lead to approximately $4.3 billion in passive buying from index-tracking funds like the Invesco QQQ Trust.
• SpaceX's inclusion was expedited due to rule changes allowing large IPOs to join after 15 trading days, but its weight in the index may be limited by its small public float (3-4%).
• Investors in the Invesco QQQ Trust gain exposure to SpaceX's space, satellite broadband (Starlink), and AI infrastructure businesses.
• SpaceX reported a $4.94 billion net loss in 2025 and requires 12 months of public trading history and GAAP profitability for S&P 500 inclusion, which it currently does not meet.
• Starlink, accounting for about 60% of SpaceX's $18.7 billion revenue in 2025, is its primary profit engine, generating $1.2 billion in operating profit for the connectivity segment in Q1.
news.Keywords: Nasdaq-100, index inclusion, passive buying, Starlink, public float

news.Title: 《韓股》三星財報不敵獲利了結賣壓，KOSPI收跌4.91%
news.Content:
MoneyDJ新聞 2026-07-07 16:15:12 數位內容中心 發佈

韓股今(7)日明顯轉弱。韓國KOSPI指數終場收於7,656.31點，下跌395.02點或4.91%；韓國KOSDAQ指數收於831.23點，下跌15.84點或1.87%。盤面原本受到Samsung Electronics(005930.KS)公布第二季創紀錄獲利激勵，惟最終演變成獲利了結與外資賣壓主導的急跌，KOSPI指數盤中更觸發熔斷機制，顯示市場情緒快速降溫。

韓股市場賣壓主要來自外資連續第13個交易日賣超，且今日在有價證券市場大幅調節，放大了指數波動。Samsung Electronics與SK hynix(000660.KS)同步走弱，成為拖累KOSPI指數的主要力量，也讓即使基本面消息偏正面的個股，仍難以扭轉整體盤勢。

權值股方面，大型股普遍承壓。KOSPI指數權值股多數收低，Samsung Electronics、SK hynix、LG Energy Solution(373220.KS)、Hyundai Motor(005380.KS)、Samsung C&T(028260.KS)、Samsung Life(032830.KS)、Samsung Electro-Mechanics(009150.KS)與SK Square(402340.KS)等均承受賣壓。盤面顯示，資金並未因單一企業亮眼財報而回流大型股，反而在高波動下加速撤出。

KOSDAQ指數方面，跌幅相對較小但仍偏弱，盤中同樣反覆震盪，收盤仍落在今年低點附近。個股表現分歧，Alteogen(196170.KS)、Kolon TissueGene(950160.KS)、HLB(028300.KS)與ABL Bio(298380.KS)收高，EcoPro BM(247540.KS)、EcoPro(086520.KS)、Rainbow Robotics(277810.KS)、Wonik IPS(240810.KS)則走低，反映中小型股也難以擺脫整體風險偏好降溫的影響。

《韓股》KOSPI收跌0.46%、守住8000點關卡

《韓股》KOSPI收跌2.04%，半導體權值股承壓

資料來源- MoneyDJ理財網

news.Content: 台股今（7日）遭遇劇烈震盪，受到南韓股市重挫並觸發熔斷機制影響，市場恐慌情緒迅速擴散至亞洲股市，帶動台股上演「多殺多」急殺行情。加權指數早盤一度大漲近400點，高見46,967.04點，但隨後科技股拋售潮全面湧現，指數急轉直下 ...

news.Title: Recent Rumblings From the Fed Could Make This Vanguard Bond ETF a Better Buy
news.Content: The Federal Reserve might not be done raising interest rates to fight inflation. Hammack said: "We've ...
news.AI_Summary:
• Cleveland Federal Reserve President Beth Hammack suggests the AI boom could be contributing to persistent inflation, potentially requiring higher interest rates.
• If inflation remains high, the Fed may need to raise interest rates later in 2026, increasing interest rate risk for bond investors.
• Higher interest rates lead to lower bond prices, with longer-duration bonds being more sensitive to these changes.
• The Vanguard Ultra-Short Bond ETF (VUSB) is presented as a potential option for investors concerned about interest rate risk, offering a portfolio of short-term, high-quality corporate bonds.
• VUSB has an average duration of 1.0 year, an expense ratio of 0.10%, and has delivered average annual returns of 3.49% over the past five years.
news.Keywords: Federal Reserve, interest rates, inflation, bond ETFs, interest rate risk

news.Title: Meet the Dividend King Stock That's Up 20% in 2026. Here's Why It Can Continue Outperforming the S&P 500 and Nasdaq-100 in the Second Half.
news.Content:
As of market close on July 3, the S&P 500 (SNPINDEX: ^GSPC) and the Nasdaq-100 are up 9.3% and 16.2%, respectively, year to date (YTD). This is well ahead of their historical average annual gains. The tech sector, especially semiconductor stocks , has been the driver of broader market returns. But that doesn't mean all value stocks are underperforming the major indexes.

Colgate-Palmolive (NYSE: CL) is up 20.4% YTD. And it's also an ultra-reliable dividend stock that has paid uninterrupted dividends since 1895 and has increased its payout for 63 consecutive years. That streak earns Colgate-Palmolive a spot on the list of Dividend Kings, which are companies that have paid and increased their dividends for at least 50 consecutive years.

Missed Nvidia in 2009? This Rare Signal Is Flashing Again. In 2009, a "Double Down" signal flashed for a little-known chipmaker called Nvidia. For the first time in years, that same "Total Conviction" signal is flashing for a company 1/100th the size of Nvidia. Continue »

Here's why Colgate-Palmolive remains a top buy now even after its recent run-up.

Colgate-Palmolive is at the top of its game

Colgate-Palmolive has been a standout in the household and personal products industry. The company is guiding for 2026 net sales growth of 2% to 6% and organic sales growth of 1% to 4% at a time when many of its peers are experiencing sales declines. And even with margins under pressure, Colgate-Palmolive remains one of the most profitable companies in its industry. By comparison, Unilever , Kenvue , Church & Dwight , Clorox , Kimberly-Clark, and Estee Lauder all have operating margins under 20%.

The industry has been dealing with inflationary pressures and consumer resistance to price increases. But Colgate-Palmolive has done a masterful job of navigating these challenges through its elite brand portfolio, highly efficient supply chain and operations, and geographic diversification.

In addition to its flagship Colgate and Palmolive brands, the company owns Softsoap, Irish Spring, Tom's of Maine, and Speed Stick, among others. One of Colgate-Palmolive's top brands, Hill's Pet Nutrition, made up 23% of total 2025 sales.

Without factoring in Hill's, Europe, Middle East, and Africa (EMEA), Latin America, and Asia Pacific sales are more than triple those of North America, which has helped make Colgate-Palmolive resistant to U.S.-specific inflationary pressures. In the first quarter of 2026, North America was the only region that reported declining net and organic sales, while Latin America and EMEA posted double-digit growth and total company net sales rose 8.4% year over year.

Story Continues

A dividend you can count on

Colgate-Palmolive is far from cheap -- trading at 25 times forward earnings -- because the stock price has been rising faster than the company's earnings growth. But Colgate-Palmolive deserves its premium valuation because its results are solid despite a difficult operating environment. This resilience is particularly appealing to risk-averse folks seeking a stable passive income stream to help supplement retirement income. If inflationary pressures ease and consumer spending improves, a rising tide will lift the broader household and personal products industry. But Colgate-Palmolive isn't dependent on those factors to drive sales growth.

Colgate-Palmolive yields 2.2%, which is good but not quite high-yield territory. Many of its peers offer higher yields because they distribute the vast majority of their cash flow to shareholders through dividends, whereas Colgate-Palmolive's dividend is highly affordable. Its trailing-12-month free cash flow per share is at an all-time high of $4.66, well over double its $2.06 per-share annualized dividend.

So while Colgate-Palmolive could easily afford to pay a higher dividend, the company prefers a balanced approach of using cash to reinvest in the business, paying a steadily growing (and manageable) dividend, and buying back stock. Colgate-Palmolive has reduced its share count by 10% over the last decade, which has helped make the stock a better value.

Investing in a market leader

Colgate-Palmolive's geographic diversification and portfolio of leading brands across pet nutrition and oral, personal, and home care make it highly recession resistant. The company continues to deliver solid growth through volume and price increases, while many of its peers face a difficult trade-off: either cutting prices to drive volume or keeping prices high at the expense of lower sales volumes.

All told, Colgate-Palmolive stands out as one of the most reliable dividend-paying stocks on the market. It's a top buy for the second half of the year for investors who don't mind paying a premium price for a quality company.

news.Title: 花旗喊升台積電! 最樂觀攻上"4字頭"外資最高
news.Content:
[ 非凡新聞 ]記者周恬吏,攝影謝隆証

台積電下周法說前夕，外資圈已經先行出具看法，花旗最新將目標價調升至3800元，甚至預估樂觀情境下，將挑戰4000元，帶動市場重新想像AI行情空間。即便是次高的香港研究機構，也有3500元，其它像是野村、瑞銀與麥格里等，目標價也全都在3400元上下，隨著需求從GPU擴散到ASIC、CPU與網通晶片，台積電16日法說會能否釋出更強財測，與資本支出再調升的訊號，都持續成為投資人關注焦點！

台積電法說會進入倒數計時！外資目標價再掀上修潮，花旗一口氣喊到3800元，最樂觀情境更直指4000元，刷新外資圈最高紀錄！看好AI需求持續爆發，花旗預估法說會將上修全年營收成長目標，以及「長期營收」年複合成長率的展望，並同步調高「資本支出預估」。

元富投顧董事長 江浩農：「（資本支出）花旗這邊，都已經調到大概750億到800億美元，所以我想相關的後續展望都非常樂觀。他們認為現在AI相關的行情，不只是在GPU，甚至已經外溢到ASIC、或者像CPU，甚至接下來像是網通晶片這些等等，一、兩個月之前，大概已經有傳出來台積電要開始漲價。假如是說接下來他這邊相關利潤都可以保持住的話，確實我想對股價來講會有很大的助益。」

除了花旗之外，Aletheia資本喊3500元，野村、瑞銀、麥格理、里昂目標價也都站上3300~3400元，高盛與瑞穗則同步上看3000元大關。

法人看好AI需求擴大，從GPU延伸到ASIC 、CPU以及高速網路晶片等應用，帶動2奈米、3奈米需求先進製程維持滿載。

康和證券投顧投資研究部主管 呂晉維：「其實下半年能見度很高，包括台積電公司本身，也持續在第二季上修中長期展望營，收成長率以美元計價的部分可能有30%以上的成長，延續到2028年，2奈米需求這邊，看起來目前都是非常的樂觀，所以我們看到外資券商這邊，紛紛調高台積電短中長期目標價，營收獲利的預期，甚至毛利率部分，其實都是偏樂觀發展。」

隨著16日法說會即將登場，台積電股價震盪，但相對有撐，市場往後將持續聚焦資本支出、毛利率與全年財測展望，判斷AI需求是否持續升溫，也牽動整體AI供應鏈後市表現。（記者周恬吏、謝隆証／台北採訪報導）

news.Title: AMD Is 11% Away From Joining the $1 Trillion Club. Could It Get There This Year?
news.Content:
AMD (NASDAQ: AMD) carries a market value of about $920 billion. To join the $1 trillion club -- the small group of companies worth 13 figures -- the stock needs to climb only about 11% from here. After the run it has been on, more than quadrupling off its 52-week low, that no longer sounds far-fetched.

So could AMD close the final stretch and cross $1 trillion before the year is out?

Missed Nvidia in 2009? This Rare Signal Is Flashing Again. In 2009, a "Double Down" signal flashed for a little-known chipmaker called Nvidia. For the first time in years, that same "Total Conviction" signal is flashing for a company 1/100th the size of Nvidia. Continue »

Where the growth comes from

What's powering AMD isn't its long-standing business in personal-computer and gaming chips, steady as that has become. It is the data center -- and, within it, the AI accelerators (the specialized graphics processing units, or GPUs ) it sells to companies building out artificial intelligence (AI) infrastructure.

In the first quarter of 2026, AMD's data center revenue rose 57% year over year to about $5.8 billion -- more than half of the company's $10.3 billion in total sales, and up sharply from a business a fraction of this size a few years ago. AI accelerators make up a substantial piece of that data center total, and sales of those accelerators grew by a strong double-digit percentage year over year. In other words, the fastest-growing part of AMD -- the data center -- is now also its largest.

Zoom out to the full year, and the trajectory looks just as steep. AMD grew 2025 revenue 34% to $34.6 billion and more than doubled its bottom line, with earnings up 164%. Its newest MI350 accelerators are ramping into large customers now, a next-generation MI450 part is on the way, and the company has landed commitments from hyperscale customers for multiple gigawatts of computing capacity. That kind of forward demand is why investors keep pushing the stock higher.

AMD's other businesses are pulling their weight, too. Its server processors have been steadily taking share from Intel , and management now expects the overall server-processor market to top $120 billion a year by 2030 -- a market that would dwarf the company's entire sales base today. Whether that proves too optimistic or not, it captures why the market is willing to price the stock years ahead of results actually on the books.

Could it hit $1 trillion this year?

The path is credible. To reach $1 trillion, AMD needs its stock to add about 1% -- and a company growing earnings this fast, in a market this enamored with AI, can cover that ground quickly. Nvidia crossed the same mark, and then several more, on the strength of the very same demand.

Story Continues

But just because the path is credible doesn't make the stock a buy. There are risks. For instance, AMD is up against a juggernaut. And Nvidia still dominates. Additionally, another key risk is that AMD's largest customers are designing in-house chips.

In addition, the stock's valuation is already stretched. At about $554 per share, AMD trades at more than 180 times its earnings and about 75 times the earnings expected over the next year. Multiples like that bake in years of rapid growth with very little margin for a stumble.

So, could AMD hit $1 trillion in 2026?

Yes -- I think there is a fair chance, and a strong quarter or two might be all it takes. But I wouldn't buy the growth stock just because this milestone is possible. Crossing $1 trillion would make headlines, but it wouldn't make the business's underlying intrinsic value worth more than the day before. At more than 180 times earnings, AMD is priced for the accelerator boom to keep running with almost no missteps.

news.Title: 【Follow法人】三大法人合砍946億元！外資續賣547億元 分析師：沒有太過悲觀
news.Content:
台股今（7）日重挫千餘點，收在45,479點。三大法人合計賣超台股946.91億元，其中外資續砍547.31億元，呈連4賣，累計已倒貨2470.65億元。分析師表示，此波賣壓主要反映全球股市同步修正，外資態度偏空、謹慎保守，但並未大幅看空，預計在台積電法說會登場前，市場觀望氣氛仍濃。

根據證交所公布籌碼動向，三大法人今合計賣超946.91億元。其中外資續站賣方，今日賣超547.31億元，已連續4個交易日站在賣方，累計賣超金額達2470.65億元。

投信方面則是持續站在買方，今日買超87.73億元，呈連11買。

自營商續站賣方，合計賣超487.33億元，其中自行買賣部分賣超126.09億元，避險操作賣超361.23億元。

資深證券分析師王兆立表示，今天台股表現雖然疲弱，但放眼亞洲市場，南韓股市跌幅更重、日股也同步走弱，在全球股市回檔之際，法人選擇先行調節、降低持股水位屬於正常操作，外資對台股並沒有太過悲觀。

此外，外資期貨淨空單維持8萬口之上，王兆立指出，空單水位與前幾日相比變化不大，顯示外資態度雖偏空、謹慎保守，但並未非進一步大幅看空。他認為，在台積電法說會登場前，市場觀望氣氛仍濃，指數短期內較可能維持區間震盪整理，待法說會釋出展望後，才有機會形成較明確的多空方向。

台股今日開高走低，盤中指數逼近4萬7，投資人獲利了解賣壓出籠，加權指數終場收在45,479點，跳水1,077點，創史上第8慘，成交金額約1.16兆元。

王詩婷／財經特派記者，主跑勞動部、半導體、生技等

news.Title: 國巨、禾伸堂、華新科…被動元件慘遭割韭菜！網哀號「慘劇重演」 法人揭背後全因這件事
news.Content: 台股被動元件龍頭國巨*(2327)近日股價劇烈大洗三溫暖。在經歷今年上半年一波漲幅超過三倍的驚人狂飆後，今（7）日卻遭遇沉重的獲利了結賣壓。國巨開盤後一路下殺，最終慘摔100元，以跌停價905元作收，不僅失守千元、月線大關，更直接吞下一根黑K棒，引發市場與社群投資人一陣哀號，質疑當年的「被動元件慘劇」是否再度重演。 散戶情緒兩極，有人感慨「國巨跌停喔」、「恐慌殺盤？」，也有人認為這是健康換手、短線洗盤後的機會，強調「高階MLCC需求快速升溫，國巨有望拿外溢訂單」。 事實上，被動元件族群近日股價劇烈受壓，最核心的原因在於短線漲幅已大，市場在「利多出盡」的情緒下引發法人與主力資金的強烈獲利了結賣壓。雖然產業基本面受惠AI出現結構性缺貨，但多重外部利空齊發，導致族群今日爆發集體跌停潮。 結構性分化 消費性電子需求依然疲弱 根據研調機構集邦科技（TrendForce）的最新報告指出，雖然AI伺服器與自研ASIC晶片帶動高階MLCC供不應求，但同時也揭露了一項隱憂：一般消費性電子（如手機、筆電）仍受全球高利率環境壓制，終端需求依然疲弱。 這使得高階與低階產品出現嚴重脫鉤。市場原本預期被動元件會迎來「全面性大復甦」，但數據揭露景氣僅屬於「結構性分化」，未能全面齊揚，直接動搖了部分短線多頭的信心。 法人籌碼鬆動 外資調升目標價反成下車誘因 由於國巨股價在短線上面臨極大漲幅，市場多頭氣氛在歷史高檔區轉趨謹慎。從近期三大法人的進出籌碼可以發現，本土投信法人近期出現明顯的「結帳減碼」大換股，近5日內投信瘋狂拋售高達14,269張，自營商也同步站在賣方。在本土法人籌碼面集體鬆動下，引發資金連鎖退場恐慌，導致國巨、禾伸堂(3026)、華新科(2492)等被動元件指標股集體垂淚觸及跌停。 近日美系與本土法人相繼發布樂觀報告，看好國巨7月起全面調漲全系列電容產品價格，甚至高喊目標價1,490元。然而，這種極度樂觀的市場訊息，反而與外資報告唱反調，成為內資、主力與外資大咖「反向對倒、逢高下車」的最佳契機。這導致利多見報後股價反而連續兩日重挫，形成經典的「利多出盡」走勢。 國際科技股震盪與系統性資金撤離 除了族群內部因素，外部環境也相當嚴峻。全球市場對AI晶片硬體需求傳出零星雜音，加上亞洲主要股市（如韓股盤中觸發熔斷機制、日股大跌）波動劇烈，引發區域性資金的連鎖拋售。 在科技硬體雜音傳出之下，台股大盤因整體電子權值股修正而劇烈回檔。短線資金為了尋求避險，集體撤出先前最為強勢的PCB、功率半導體與被動元件等電子零組件族群，轉向生技等防禦型板塊避險。 長線基本面仍穩健 儘管股價短期面臨籌碼面的劇烈修正，但從基本面來看，國巨的營收表現依舊亮眼。受惠於AI伺服器與高端應用的強勁拉貨，國巨在2026年第1季營收寫下約12億美元的歷史新高紀錄。此外，最新公布的5月營收達150.58億元，年增率高達47.46%，市場目前正密切屏息等待即將公布的6月營收數據。 國巨近年積極進行結構轉型，高階市場（包含AI、車用、工規、航太醫療）營收占比已大幅拉高至75%，大中華區營收比重則降至25%以下，成功跳脫過去傳統消費性電子景氣循環的束縛。目前AI相關應用的營收占比已達總營收的15%。 注意短線籌碼與液冷變數

news.Title: 《美股主題週報》關鍵資源「鈾」—CCJ、UEC、LEU
news.Content:
MoneyDJ新聞 2026-07-07 14:59:42 數位內容中心 發佈

Cameco（CCJ.US）

公司披露正提高對Cigar Lake的控制權，擬以約1.16億加元收購TEPCO Resources持有的5%權益，完成後持股升至57.418%。同時重申Cigar Lake於2026年產量指引為1750萬至1800萬磅。

Uranium Energy Corp.（UEC.US）

7月2日，Willow Creek ISR的Charlie Amendment進入地下水重分類公開評論程序，申請把既有含水層豁免再擴增約352.2英畝，評論期至8月3日下午5點。這是公司美國本土ISR項目的最新監管節點。

Centrus Energy（LEU.US）

6月中旬，Centrus與Oklo簽署高豐度低濃縮鈾（HALEU）供應意向書，預計自2029年起由俄亥俄州Piketon廠區供貨，最多支援5座反應爐的多年需求。這讓美國先進反應爐燃料鏈出現更明確的商業時程。

Denison Mines（DNN.US）

7月2日，Peter Ballantyne Cree Nation撤回對Phoenix原地浸出式（ISR）鈾礦環評核准的司法覆核，並正式表態支持Wheeler River Project。資料並列出Phoenix已於2026年3月展開早期工程，首次投產目標為2028年。

enCore Energy（EU.US）

6月30日，Dewey Burdock ISR項目取得美國核能管理委員會（NRC）20年期Source Materials License更新，執照SUA-1600有效至2046年6月。公司並表示，隨NRC完成安全評估，該項目已取得所有必要聯邦許可。

Energy Fuels（UUUU.US）

截至6月30日，Energy Fuels已完成約160萬磅鈾成品產量，超過全年150萬至250萬磅指引下限。公司同時擁有美國唯一的常規鈾廠White Mesa Mill，許可產能約每年800萬磅U3O8。

Oklo（OKLO.US）

Oklo近期把燃料供應與監管節點同步往前推進，2029年起將由Centrus供應HALEU，最多支援5座反應爐；6月19日，美國能源部也核准Aurora-INL計畫初步文件化安全分析，完成授權流程四大步驟中的第三步。

＊小提醒：本文內容為利用AI數位工具廣泛蒐羅、彙整全球各地新聞與多元資訊自動生成，僅供資訊參考之用，不構成任何形式的投資建議、要約或承諾，讀者應獨立判斷、審慎評估，並自負投資損益及相關風險。

news.Title: Four states seeking $1.4 trillion in penalties in child social media addiction trial, Meta says
news.Content: Four states are seeking $1.4 trillion in penalties from Meta over claims that the social media giant designed Facebook and Instagram to be addictive to children and withheld information from the public about the harms the apps pose to young users, Meta said in a court filing on Monday. The case is being brought by California, Colorado, Kentucky and New Jersey. Meta disclosed the trillion-dollar figure in its response to the attorneys general filings on how penalties should be calculated if the states win at the trial set to begin next month in Oakland, California. The company said the number, which is near Meta's market capitalization of around $1.5 trillion, was not supported by the evidence. "A sanction of that size has no analog in the history of consumer protection enforcement," the company said in the filing. Judge Lets States Pursue Claims That Meta Designed Facebook And Instagram To Addict Children Fox Business reached out to Meta for further comment. Read On The Fox Business App The states' filings are sealed, but they said during a hearing last month that they were calculating the penalties by multiplying the number of violations by fine amounts established by state law. They said the number of violations is based on the estimated number of young users impacted by Meta's social media platforms. Nearly 30 states have sued Meta in federal court , with most of them claiming the company violated the federal Children's Online Privacy Protection Act by collecting data from children without proper parental consent. The trial will address all claims brought under that law, as well as the four states' allegations that the tech giant violated their state laws aimed at protecting consumers by misleading the public about the safety of their platforms. Meta has denied the allegations, saying the attorneys general lack ‌evidence that it ⁠misled the public about its platforms' alleged addictiveness since social media addiction is not an established psychiatric condition. The company has also pushed back on accusations that it violated the Children's Online Privacy Protection Act because it marketed Facebook and Instagram to a wider audience and not only children under 13. Google's Youtube Reaches Settlement In Lawsuit Alleging Child Social Media Addiction Another 14 states have brought claims under their own laws, which will be heard at a separate trial next year. Late last month, U.S. District Judge Yvonne Gonzalez Rogers rejected Meta's bid to dismiss the case, saying factual disputes remained over whether its social media platforms were addictive, whether ​the company falsely denied it designed them that way and whether it "partially" marketed the platforms ​towards children. Story Continues "We strongly disagree with these allegations and are confident the evidence will show our longstanding commitment to supporting young people," a Meta spokesperson said in a statement to Fox Business at the time. Meta, Snapchat, YouTube and TikTok are facing thousands of lawsuits in both federal and state court over allegations they knowingly designed their platforms to be addictive to young users, contributing to a mental health crisis. New Mexico was the first state to go to trial , with a jury awarding it $375 million in March after finding Meta had misled consumers in the state. A judge in New Mexico is also weighing the second portion of the state's case, which asks for additional damages and a court order instructing the company to make changes to Facebook, Instagram and WhatsApp. Reuters contributed to this report. Original article source: Four states seeking $1.4 trillion in penalties in child social media addiction trial, Meta says Meta said four states are seeking $1.4 trillion in penalties from the company over claims that the social media giant designed Facebook and Instagram to addict child users. Meta said four states are seeking $1.4 trillion in penalties from the company over claims that the social media giant designed Facebook and Instagram to addict child users. Fox Business reached out to Meta for further comment.

news.Title: The Stock Market Just Finished Its Best Quarter in Years. Here's What History Says Is Coming Next.
news.Content:
The S&P 500 (SNPINDEX: ^GSPC) was up nearly 15% in the second quarter of 2026, its best performance since the COVID-19 rebound in 2020. After an up-and-down first quarter, the S&P 500 was up roughly 10% for the entire first half, putting it on pace for its fourth consecutive year of double-digit gains.

History shows those kinds of streaks are rare. Most notably, the S&P 500 put up five consecutive double-digit-return years from 1995 to 1999. Of course, most people know that streak ended with the tech bubble bursting and resulted in three consecutive years of negative double-digit returns.

Missed Nvidia in 2009? This Rare Signal Is Flashing Again. In 2009, a "Double Down" signal flashed for a little-known chipmaker called Nvidia. For the first time in years, that same "Total Conviction" signal is flashing for a company 1/100th the size of Nvidia. Continue »

Naturally, there's some skepticism about how long these kinds of returns can last. The artificial intelligence (AI) boom is still driving revenue and earnings growth, but high inflation, slowing growth, possible Federal Reserve rate hikes, and the geopolitical environment are all current risks.

Earnings growth will be the driver in the short term

Current FactSet estimates call for 24% earnings growth in 2026 and another 17% in 2027. While anything can certainly happen, it's difficult to imagine stock prices correcting significantly with that kind of earnings growth in the background.

It might be another story if valuations were excessive. The Shiller CAPE ratio, which measures stock prices against 10-year inflation-adjusted earnings, is near an all-time high. But the forward price-to-earnings (P/E) ratio for the Vanguard S&P 500 ETF (NYSEMKT: VOO) is only around 23. That's higher than its long-term average, but below its 2024 and 2025 peaks.

With earnings growing strongly and valuations at reasonable levels, it's easy to make the case that stock prices could keep pushing higher.

Long-term investors should remain undeterred

Even if short-term conditions were more challenging, long-term investors should stay the course. The S&P 500 has averaged a 10% annual return over the past century. Any given year can be up or down, but history shows that a longer holding period generally translates to a greater chance of success.

Here's a good example. Over the past decade, the Vanguard S&P 500 ETF delivered an average annual return of more than 15%. That decade happened to include a 20% correction in late 2018, a sharp drawdown of more than 30% during the beginning of the COVID pandemic, and the 2022 bear market, which sent stocks down by roughly 24%.

Story Continues

Yet despite all of this, investors were rewarded with above-average returns for the full holding period, if they remained invested throughout.

That's the key. Buy-and-hold investing requires holding even in rough market conditions. Many of folks head for the exits after stock prices have already declined, only to miss the subsequent rebound. In many cases, investors damage their own long-term returns more than the stock market ever did just by trying to time the market.

Even after such a strong bull-market rally that's still alive, the future looks bright for those willing to stay the course.

news.Title: Google, RWE back Proxima Fusion in €411 million financing round
news.Content:
July 7 (Reuters) - Magnetic fusion start-up Proxima Fusion has raised €411 million ($469.69 million) from investors ‌including Alphabet's Google and German utility RWE ‌as part of a financing round, the Munich-based start-up ​said on Tuesday.

• "Proxima's financing demonstrates that Europe can not only invent breakthrough technologies, but also build globally competitive companies around them," Francesco Sciortino, Proxima ‌Fusion's chief executive, ⁠said in a statement

More from Yahoo Scout

What is Proxima Fusion's stellarator technology approach?

Who led Proxima Fusion's €411 million funding round?

How does nuclear fusion differ from traditional energy?

What partnership did RWE establish with Proxima Fusion?

• The round was led by XTX Ventures and East ⁠X Ventures, with RWE and Google as strategic investors, the company said

• It added that ​the financing ​round brings Proxima Fusion's ​valuation to €2.4 billion ($2.7 ‌billion)

• German utility company RWE invested €25 million euros in the funding round

• RWE signed an agreement with Proxima to partner on building the first stellarator fusion power plant on the site of ‌a former nuclear fission ​power plant in Gundremmingen, Bavaria

• ​Unlike the burning ​of fossil fuels or the fission ‌process of existing nuclear ​power plants, nuclear ​fusion offers the possibility of abundant energy without pollution, radioactive waste or greenhouse gases, ​replicating with ‌lasers or magnets the reaction that fuels ​the sun

($1 = 0.8750 euros)

(Reporting by Danny Callaghan, ​Editing by Friederike Heine)

news.Title: Is the SpaceX IPO Officially Overhyped?
news.Content:
Space Exploration Technologies ' (NASDAQ: SPCX) (SpaceX) initial public offering (IPO) was undoubtedly the most hyped IPO in recent stock market memory. It didn't disappoint, either, setting the record for the largest IPO in stock market history, with an initial valuation of around $1.77 trillion. Now, it's valued at over $2.1 trillion as of market close on July 2.

In the short time since its June 12 IPO, SpaceX's stock is relatively flat (from the price the average investor could have paid), experiencing roller coaster ups and downs. Still, there's a lot of hype surrounding both the company and the stock -- but is it overhyped? It depends on how you define it.

Missed Nvidia in 2009? This Rare Signal Is Flashing Again. In 2009, a "Double Down" signal flashed for a little-known chipmaker called Nvidia. For the first time in years, that same "Total Conviction" signal is flashing for a company 1/100th the size of Nvidia. Continue »

SpaceX is going just beyond rockets

SpaceX is transforming from a rocket launch company into a respectable conglomerate with thriving subsidiaries under its wing. It has its core launch business, which is the largest in the world; Starlink is growing impressively and providing internet to some of the most remote places globally; and X's (formerly Twitter) parent company, xAI, has artificial intelligence infrastructure that many tech companies would give their right arm for.

Much of the appeal of SpaceX's business, however, is its ambitious plan for the future. Moonshot plans (no pun intended) like data centers in space and everyday human space travel spark the interest of investors and Elon Musk fans who see SpaceX's trajectory mirroring that of Musk's other company, Tesla . Tesla's returns have been just above the S&P 500 's over the past five years, but it's up over 30,600% since its July 2010 IPO.

We can't predict how SpaceX's stock will perform, but it has businesses worth being excited about.

Is SpaceX's IPO overhyped?

If by overhyped, you mean that SpaceX is all promise and nothing to show, then I would say no, it's not. If by overhyped you mean extremely expensive for a business that is currently operating at a loss and built on (very) long-term promises, then I would say yes.

Taking SpaceX's $18.7 billion in revenue in 2025 and its $2.1 trillion valuation, it's currently trading at 112 times its sales (P/S ratio). For comparison, here are the P/S ratios for some notable companies and their year-over-year revenue growth last quarter:

Company

P/S Ratio

Latest Revenue Growth

Broadcom

23.3

Nvidia

18.8

Alphabet

10.4

Apple

10.1

Amazon

Story Continues

Source: YCharts. P/S ratios as of market close on July 2.

These aren't apples-to-apples comparisons, but the larger point is how much of a premium you'd be paying for SpaceX's stock right now, even before seeing one quarterly earnings report as a public company.

This isn't a knock on SpaceX as a company by any means, but a great company doesn't always make a great investment. If you already own shares, I would hold onto them (you should be focused on the long term either way), but if you're thinking about making your first investment, I would wait it out a bit.

news.Title: 台股行情帶動民生消費 首季國內消費實質成長4.31%
news.Content:
7日台股開盤上漲，隨後急挫下殺翻黑，一度達4萬6527點，緊接著在主力拉抬之下再拉回，盤中最高一度達4萬6967點，宛如雲霄飛車「上沖下洗」。台積電則維持高點震盪，盤中最高達2500元、成支撐力道。

鄰近亞股，日經指數和韓國綜合股價指數則雙雙下殺、開低走低。近期台股「牛氣沖天」，也帶動外溢效應，但學界也觀察市場熱錢多數沒有回歸到內需市場。

亞太商工總會執行長邱達生表示，「那因為台股創高，不代表全民都賺到錢，那財富主要集中在AI供應鏈跟股票投資族群，而且很多的獲利又再繼續投入股市。」

過去國內主要經濟表現集中在出口，而根據行政院主計總處統計，2026年第1季民間消費成長達4.74%，創10季來新高，主計總處更上修今（2026）年成長率到3.6%，創3年最佳表現。不過比對第1季，國內消費實質成長是4.31%，在國外消費實質成長則高達11.57%，則被認為不成比例。

緯創集團董事長林憲銘認為，「（外溢效應）有的時候，你還是要有一些時間的這種醞釀，當然第二個就是說，如果能夠再配合政策上的推動，比如說像前一陣子美國也在思考就是說，把企業免稅的門檻再拉高。」

身為半導體供應鏈企業，緯創董事長林憲銘表示，AI市場價值已逐步獲得驗證，應用範圍持續擴大。至於要讓半導體產業成長果實外溢到民間消費，仍需政策推動，改善內需體質，帶動台灣經濟正向發展。

news.Title: Synopsys to cut chip fab manufacturing control software in shift to AI design, sources say
news.Content:
By Cynthia Kim and Hyunjoo Jin

SEOUL, July 7 (Reuters) - U.S. chip design giant Synopsys plans to stop offering a suite of manufacturing process control software used by global semiconductor makers, six sources briefed on the matter said, as it seeks to ‌divert resources to higher-margin offerings such as AI design.

Synopsys in April and May informed more than 10 chipmakers including Samsung Electronics, ‌SK Hynix, Kioxia Holdings Corp and Qorvo Inc about the "end of life" move that means Synopsys will not provide future new versions and will only carry out maintenance obligations, two of ​the sources said.

The affected products include the Equipment Engineering System (EES) and Fault Detection and Classification (FDC), a set of automation software that acts as the central nervous system of semiconductor fabrication plants to monitor and detect any anomalies before they cascade into costly defects, the two sources said.

The company has already laid off a few dozen staff, said three of the sources, one of whom added that Synopsys plans to conclude talks with each chipmaker on maintenance obligations by ‌July.

Synopsys is discontinuing some legacy manufacturing analytics products to ⁠focus resources on the highest-value products, a company spokesperson told Reuters in a statement, without naming the products.

The move highlights a changing balance in the semiconductor software industry, where vendors are investing more heavily in AI design technologies ⁠while some chipmakers increasingly build manufacturing software in-house.

"While we are discontinuing certain manufacturing analytics products, which are older diagnostic tools not in our customers' critical paths of production, we continue to invest in new capabilities in this area of our portfolio and are honoring all existing contractual and support obligations as we take this action," the Synopsys spokesperson said.

The company declined to ​disclose ​whether job cuts were involved.

CUSTOMERS LOOK TO DEVELOP IN-HOUSE TOOLS

Synopsys began offering the EES ​product after acquiring semiconductor manufacturing solutions from South Korean ‌firm BISTel in 2021 for an undisclosed amount.

One of the sources said Synopsys had been wanting to be free of support and maintenance obligations related to IP services and to reallocate engineers to high-margin AI design. Synopsys completed its $35 billion purchase of engineering software firm Ansys in 2025.

That person and a second source said the software's removal risked causing some declines in production yields for chipmakers as the software needed to be constantly maintained, updated and patched.

Story Continues

However, four of the other sources said they did not expect an impact on production at major chipmakers.

One of the sources said the ‌decision was also taken partly because enhancing the EES service required chipmakers to share ​tightly-held manufacturing data. Some clients like Samsung were also developing their own in-house tools, impacting ​the competitiveness of Synopsys' offerings, two sources said.

A Samsung spokesperson ​confirmed the end-of-life decision and said active discussions were underway with Synopsys regarding the product's sunset. Samsung had established compatible ‌alternatives and there would be "no negative impact on production," the ​spokesperson said when asked if production ​yields could decline.

SK Hynix declined to comment. Kioxia and Qorvo did not respond to requests for comment.

Synopsys has for decades been one of the main suppliers of software used in determining how to arrange the tens of billions of transistors that make up chips, which ​can be 2,000 times smaller than the width ‌of a strand of human hair.

In March, Synopsys introduced a technology it said would pave the way toward AI agents taking ​over many of the tasks in creating chips.

(Reporting by Cynthia Kim and Hyunjoo Jin in Seoul, Wen-Yee Lee in Taipei and ​Stephen Nellis in San Francisco; Editing by Brenda Goh and Jamie Freed)

news.Title: Tesla's Robotaxi Just Launched in Miami -- Its First City Outside Texas and California. Can It Rescue the Stock?
news.Content: Tesla (NASDAQ: TSLA) Robotaxis began picking up passengers in Miami on Friday -- the company's first market outside Texas and California. The service begins modestly, in a geofenced slice of western Miami-Dade County reportedly running from West Miami toward Doral, with downtown and Miami Beach left out for now. The day before, Tesla reported 480,126 second-quarter deliveries, up about 25% year over year -- and the stock fell 7.5% anyway. But the stock is regaining some ground on Monday as investors hope the company's Robotaxi business may begin to gain steam. Missed Nvidia in 2009? This Rare Signal Is Flashing Again. In 2009, a "Double Down" signal flashed for a little-known chipmaker called Nvidia. For the first time in years, that same "Total Conviction" signal is flashing for a company 1/100th the size of Nvidia. Continue » Is the Robotaxi business scaling fast enough to be that something? The map is filling in The Robotaxi service is barely a year old. Tesla launched it in Austin last summer with safety monitors aboard, began removing them, and has been layering on markets since. Miami is a sensible next test bed, too: flat roads, year-round driving weather, and heavy visitor traffic that leans on ride-hailing. Notably, Miami extends the Robotaxi footprint beyond Tesla's home states for the first time. According to the company's first-quarter update, Tesla lists Austin, Dallas, and Houston as ramping unsupervised, operates with safety drivers in the San Francisco Bay Area, and lists Miami, Orlando, Tampa, Phoenix, and Las Vegas as markets with preparations underway. Friday converted the first of those five from planned to live. But Tesla still hasn't yet reached meaningful scale -- at least not enough to significantly enhance the bull case for the stock. The Austin fleet is still reportedly measured by the dozens of vehicles, with the unsupervised portion of this fleet smaller still. And early riders across markets have described long waits and occasional software misfires. Additionally, availability remains limited to specific service areas in Tesla's dedicated Robotaxi app -- another sign this remains a controlled rollout rather than a mass-market service. What a city launch can't fix The market's frustration that has left shares in the red for the year arguably isn't about Tesla's expanding Robotaxi service. The company's first-quarter operating margin was just 4.2%, on revenue that grew 16%. Additionally, the stock's valuation remains difficult to justify. With $1.10 in earnings per share over the past 12 months, the stock trades at more than 380 times earnings -- a price that arguably makes sense only if autonomy becomes a large, profitable business on a reasonable timeline. Growth in the teens isn't what investors are paying for. Autonomy is. Story Continues Ultimately, a launch in Miami shows progress. But investors still need more concrete evidence to know Robotaxi can become material to results soon. Tesla hasn't disclosed Robotaxi revenue, ride volumes, utilization, or per-mile costs. Investors, therefore, are still mostly left in the dark. We'll likely know more on July 22, when Tesla is scheduled to report earnings. If Tesla opts to provide more data on the Robotaxi program and more details about its plans and its potential economics, investors will have more data points to gauge just how much this Robotaxi business may be worth to the overall business. So, can Miami rescue the stock? Based on the stock's sharp rebound on Monday, the initial phases of a rescue may already be underway. But shares are still down almost 7% year to date. To fully recover, Tesla will likely need more upbeat news on its Robotaxi program -- news that starts making it sound like the program will soon start contributing meaningfully to Tesla's financial results. The rollout cadence is encouraging -- five markets live and four more queued -- and Tesla is executing the expansion it laid out for investors. But with a price-to-earnings ratio of about 380, the growth stock needs autonomy to start showing up in the financial statements, not just on maps. We just issued 'double down' alerts on 3 stocks — find out if Tesla made our list Ever feel like you missed the boat in buying the most successful stocks? Then you'll want to hear this. On rare occasions, our expert team of analysts issues a "Double Down" stock recommendation for companies that they think are about to pop. If you're worried you've already missed your chance to invest, now is the best time to buy before it's too late. And the numbers speak for themselves: Nvidia: if you invested $1,000 when we doubled down in 2009, you'd have $505,952 !* Apple: if you invested $1,000 when we doubled down in 2008, you'd have $58,823 !* Netflix: if you invested $1,000 when we doubled down in 2004, you'd have $418,761 !* Right now, we're issuing "Double Down" alerts for three incredible companies, available when you join Stock Advisor , and there may not be another chance like this anytime soon. news.Title: 績效1表看》相信台股長期向上 與其買0050為何不買正2賺更多？1張1萬就能賺2倍
news.Content:
台股在4萬多點高檔，很多人借錢炒股，槓桿型ETF正2就很受歡迎，以追求單日正向2倍報酬為目標，不敗教主陳重銘表示，既然相信台股長期向上，與其投資0050不如買正2賺更多，近5年00685L漲574%，是0050漲257%的2倍多，內扣也低，還是最便宜正2，1張僅1.2萬多元，很適合股災時加碼，因為大盤指數不會歸零，「跌越深就彈越高」可以賺更多。

陳重銘在臉書表示，你一定聽過：如果你相信台灣股市長期往上，就定期定額買元大台灣50(0050)，長期投資！那麼你有想過嗎？既然你相信股市長期向上，為何不買正2來賺更多？

讓我們用數字說話，統計過去5年，加權指數正二ETF漲幅皆超過0050的2倍，而且群益臺灣加權正2(00685L)表現更勝過其它正2 ETF喔！既然都是追蹤加權指數，為何00685L獨占鰲頭？

由於正2型ETF都是持有期貨，所以經理費通常比較高，例如元大台灣50正2(00631L)是1%，但是群益投信讓利給投資人，00685L的經理費僅0.3%，是正2型ETF中最低的，所以長期報酬表現就高過其它正2型ETF。請記住：長期投資，低成本很重要。

現在大盤在4萬5千點的高處，會有危險嗎？要看護國神山啊，目前台積電(2330)占大盤重為41.65%(2026/6/30)，法人預估今年EPS高達108.2元，較去年成長超過6成，外資喊台積電目標價3,500元。所以，只要台積電獲利成長，大盤實在是沒有悲觀的理由。

4檔正2型ETF怎麼選？當然挑報酬率最高、成本最低的

其實正2型ETF不是只能夠長期持有，陳重銘說，在股災時也很喜歡用正2賺價差！去年美國挑起關稅戰，台股大盤跌到國安基金進場護盤，這時候就是買加權正2進場，原因很簡單，因為相信加權指數不會歸零，國際因素讓股市重挫，就是撿便宜的好時機！

你應該也有聽過「賺到指數，卻賠價差」，股災時很多人急著搶短線，可是那麼多股票要買哪一檔？如果射飛鏢亂買的話，就算將來大盤翻揚，你的股票也有可能賠錢喔！所以，股災時都不會花時間去選股，直接買進大盤的風險反而是最低的。

而且股災時一定買正2，因為「跌得深就彈得高」，這是一個數學小常識喔。假設大盤下跌10%，正2就是下跌20%；如果大盤要回到原來高度，需要上漲1/0.9－1＝11.1%；正2卻會上漲1/0.8－1＝25%，比大盤的2倍還要高。所以股災時一定會用正2抄底，因為加權指數不會歸零，跌得深就彈得高。

目前國內有4檔正2型ETF，該怎麼選啊？當然是挑選報酬率最高、長期持有成本最低的00685L。00685L因為太會漲，股價超過300元，一張要30萬有點貴。為了讓小資族負擔得起，00685L啟動「1拆24」的股票分割計畫，原持有股票的1張會變成24張，但是股價也會變成24分之1。

今天是7/7，00685L分割後重新上市，1張只要1萬多，是所有加權正2中最低的！正2型ETF的波動確實比較大，但是「跌得深，彈得高」的特點也很迷人。如果是沒有操作過正2的朋友，建議先用小量資金進場，等到熟悉高波動的特性後，再一步步的增加資金。

正2可以長期投資嗎？請你問一下自己，如果你相信台灣股市長期往上，為何不買正2來賺更多？

news.Title: 7月台股期指跌1099點
news.Content:
（中央社台北7日電）台北股市今天終場跌1077.28點，收45479.11點。7月台指期以45775點作收，下跌1099點，與現貨相較，正價差295.89點。

台灣期貨交易所為近2個月指數期貨契約訂定開盤參考價為，7月期貨46874點、8月期貨47144點。

7月台指期貨以45775點作收，跌1099點，成交8萬5172口；8月期貨以45982點作收，跌1162點，成交1735口。實際收盤價格以期交所公告為準。1150707

news.Title: 〈台股盤後〉科技股跳水豬羊變色 跌1077點摜破月線收45479點
news.Content:
台股今 (7) 日受到 Nasdaq 期指走跌、日韓股市下挫，盤中電子股賣壓湧現急殺，加權指數開高走低，收盤下跌 1077.28 點或 2.31%，摜破月線收 45479.11 點，成交金額 1.17 兆元，在電子股走跌下，生技、金融族群成為資金避風港，相對抗跌。

台積電 (2330-TW) 午後翻黑，跌 20 元或 0.8%，收在最低價 2440 元，聯發科 (2454-TW) 下跌 1.7%，台達電 (2308-TW) 則跌逾半根停板，再度失守 2000 元大關，鴻海 (2317-TW) 跌 2%，日月光投控 (3711-TW)、台光電 (2383-TW) 跌 4%，南亞 (1303-TW)、穎崴 (6515-TW)、景碩 (3189-TW)、致茂 (2360-TW) 也收跌停。

被動元件族群成災區，國巨 *(2327-TW)、華新科 (2492-TW)、禾伸堂 (3026-TW) 均亮燈跌停，大毅 (2478-TW)、日電貿 (3090-TW)、興勤 (2428-TW)、光頡 (3624-TW)、金山電 (8042-TW) 等均跌停，穩得 (6761-TW)、立隆電 (2472-TW)、鈞寶 (6155-TW)、蜜望實 (8043-TW)、立敦 (6175-TW)、越峰 (8121-TW) 等跌 8%。

不過，川湖 (2059-TW) 逆勢上漲 6%，貿聯 - KY(3665-TW)、瑞昱 (2379-TW) 也收紅，均是盤面上少數有撐的電子指標；而生技族群今日無懼大盤重挫，股價表現續強，康霈 *(6919-TW) 收漲停，藥華藥 (6446-TW) 漲逾 3%；金控股同樣抗跌，國票金 (2882-TW)、凱基金 (2883-TW) 漲 3%，元大金 (2885-TW) 漲 2%。

news.Title: 今日台股》台股盤中軟腳！終場下跌1077點　台積電收今日最低價2440元
news.Content:
今日個股成交量排行榜前五名：群創、友達、新纖、中石化、力積電

今日個股成交值排行榜前五名：台積電、國巨*、群創、欣興、南亞科

台北股市今（7）日再度震盪，以46,700.42點盤上開出，最高來到46,967.04點，不過接近午盤遇到賣壓襲擊，隨後跳水翻黑，最低來到45,432.02點，上下震盪1,535.02點，終場下跌1,077.28點（約2.31%），收在45,479.11點，失守46,000點，成交量為1.16兆元。

中小型股賣壓更重，以439.63點盤上開出後立即翻黑，最低來到418.45點，終場下跌20.33點（約4.62%），收在419.47點，成交量為2,736.96億元。

權值股開高走低，權王台積電力守紅盤，以2,480元盤上開出後，盤中最高來到2,500元，不過尾盤仍不敵買壓，終場下跌20元（約0.81%），收在今日最低價2.440元，拖累大盤指數就有155點；聯發科今日除息24.5元，除息參考價4,100元，以4,200元開出，開盤即完成填息，寫下歷來第4次一日填息紀錄，不過午盤遭遇賣壓襲擊翻黑，終場下跌70元（約1.71%），收在4,030元；台達電同樣開高走低，終場下跌105元（約5.26%），收在1,890元。

>> 立即線上開證券戶 <<

先前表現強勁的族群，今日遭到提款，被動元件族群掀起跌停潮，包括日電貿、大毅、信昌電、禾伸堂、國巨*、達方、興勤、華新科、光頡、金山電，其他個股也賣壓沉重，鈞寶、蜜望實下跌逾8%，天二科技、鈺鎧下跌逾2%。

PCB族群也同步走低，銘旺科、榮科被打到跌停板，泰鼎-KY下跌逾9%，敘豐、德宏下跌逾8%，尖點、金居下跌逾7%。

功率元件族群也同步重挫，茂達、全友、杰力、博盛半導體、德微、廣閎科、環球晶被打到跌停板，台半、朋程、虹揚-KY下跌逾9%，嘉晶、尼克森下跌逾8%，合晶、昇陽半導體下跌逾6%。面板族群也走弱，群創、友達下跌逾7%，彩晶下跌逾5%。

但也有族群逆勢走高，表現最強勁的就是生技類股，多檔亮燈漲停，包括康霈*、金穎生技、長聖、共信-KY、圓祥生技、泰宗，禾榮科上漲逾8%，訊聯基因上漲逾7%。

金融股也成為資金避風港，其中元大金股價展現強勁多頭氣勢，盤中大漲半根停板，一舉衝破70元整數大關，最高觸及71.9元，改寫歷史新高紀錄，市值來到新台幣9585億元，終場上漲逾2%，其他個股也有好表現，凱基金、國泰金、聯邦銀上漲逾3%，台新新光金上漲逾1%。

news.Title: Here’s Why EyePoint, Inc. (EYPT) Is Among the Best Get Rich Quick Stocks
news.Content:
EyePoint, Inc. (NASDAQ: EYPT ) is among the best get rich quick stocks to buy right now . Andreas Argyrides, an analyst at Chardan, significantly lifted the price target on EyePoint, Inc. (NASDAQ:EYPT) to $65 from $29 on July 1. Calling the company "a de-risked, single-asset, catalyst-rich story," the firm maintained a Buy rating on the shares following a transfer of coverage.

The firm expects readouts from Phase 3 studies of DURAVYU in wet AMD, scheduled for August and October 2026, to be the key catalysts. The two biggest retinal markets, wet AMD and DME, are anticipated to achieve $13 billion in U.S. sales next year, the firm said.

Phovoir/Shutterstock.com

In one year, EyePoint, Inc. (NASDAQ:EYPT) has returned twice as much as the market, with nearly 25% outperformance. Overall, the company has a Buy rating from all twelve analysts covering the stock. With an upside potential of 153.93% based on the one-year median price target of $35.50, EYPT is among the best get rich quick stocks to buy right now.

EyePoint, Inc. (NASDAQ:EYPT) is a Massachusetts-based company specializing in therapeutics for people living with serious retinal diseases. The company's pipeline is built on its proprietary bioerodible Durasert E technology.

While we acknowledge the potential of EYPT as an investment, we believe certain AI stocks offer greater upside potential and carry less downside risk. news.Title: 台股下挫1077點收45479點　失守月線
news.Content:
（中央社記者鍾榮峰台北7日電）日韓股市重挫，權值高價股賣壓浮現，台股今天11時後指數下殺，午盤後反彈有限，終場下跌1077.28點，收45479.11點，失守46000點關卡、10日線約46057點及月線45710點。

台股今天開低震盪走低，盤中最低下挫1124點達45432點，僅金融和生技族群抗跌，千元高價股多數綠油油，被動元件一片慘綠，大盤終場收跌1077點。

台股收盤跌幅2.31%，成交值新台幣1兆1696.27億元。晶圓代工龍頭台積電終場收2440元，跌20元，跌0.81%。（編輯：楊凱翔）1150707

news.Title: Better Defense Stock to Own in 2026: PLTR vs. LMT
news.Content:
The defense trade of the past few years has split into two stories. One is about software -- the code that turns a flood of sensor data into a targeting decision. The other is about steel -- the interceptors, aircraft, and factories that fill a shooting war's shopping list.

Palantir Technologies (NASDAQ: PLTR) owns the first story. Lockheed Martin (NYSE: LMT) owns the second. Both are winning work, and the contrast between them says a lot about where defense budgets are heading in 2026.

Missed Nvidia in 2009? This Rare Signal Is Flashing Again. In 2009, a "Double Down" signal flashed for a little-known chipmaker called Nvidia. For the first time in years, that same "Total Conviction" signal is flashing for a company 1/100th the size of Nvidia. Continue »

What Palantir is doing in defense

Palantir has moved from a data vendor to the decision layer of the U.S. and allied militaries. Its Maven Smart System is built on the company's Artificial Intelligence Platform, which sifts sensor feeds and flags targets, and the Pentagon made it an official program of record in 2026.

That status matters because it signals lasting, budgeted demand rather than a pilot that could vanish. The Army folded some 75 separate contracts into a single enterprise agreement with a $10 billion ceiling over 10 years, the largest deal in the company's history, and both NATO and the U.K. have signed on for their own Maven deployments. Palantir is embedding itself as the software spine that other systems plug into, a durable place to sit as warfare becomes software-defined.

What Lockheed Martin is doing in defense

Lockheed Martin is building the hardware as needed. The center of gravity is the Golden Dome, the national missile shield that has become the defining U.S. defense program of the decade.

Lockheed landed a $35.5 billion award to produce THAAD interceptors, agreed to triple PAC-3 output and quadruple THAAD production under multiyear deals, and won prototype work on space-based interceptors designed to strike missiles after launch. Around the shield, the company keeps upgrading the F-35 with new sensors and electronic warfare capabilities, pairs the jet with autonomous drone wingmen, and pushes ahead with hypersonic weapons. It closed 2025 with a backlog of nearly $194 billion, more than two and a half years of sales on the books at the year's start.

The case for each defense stock, and the risks

Palantir's momentum is real, and its software could ride every platform in the field. The catch is that the stock trades at a level that assumes years of flawless growth, so a single quarter that misses the bar can punish the shares. It sells software into budgets that fund hardware first, which caps how large the defense slice can grow in a given year.

Story Continues

Lockheed carries its own scars. It lost the next-generation fighter contract to a rival, its fixed-price programs have a history of cost overruns, and the space-interceptor race for the Golden Dome includes a dozen competitors chasing the same dollars.

Neither name is a clean bet, and an investor should weigh the flaws in both before choosing.

The better defense stock to own in 2026

The tiebreaker for me is what 2026 funds. The money in this budget cycle flows to the missile shield and the magazines of interceptors behind it, and Lockheed Martin sits at the center of both, with multiyear contracts and a backlog that turns today's headlines into years of booked revenue.

Palantir may prove the better business over a longer arc, and its software keeps spreading across the same programs Lockheed builds. For the year ahead, though, the visibility of funded programs and the price an investor pays to own them tilt the decision toward the hardware maker.

Palantir is also caught up in the broader AI trade, where any stock with an artificial intelligence story gets bid higher on the theme rather than the results underneath it. That link cuts both ways: If sentiment around AI names cools, Palantir could sell off alongside them even if its defense contracts keep landing on schedule.

This means Lockheed Martin is the better defense stock to own in 2026, with Palantir as the one to watch as the software layer continues to grow. Investors who want defense exposure with a clear line of sight into next year's revenue have the stronger setup in Lockheed. Those who buy Palantir should size their positions to its valuation and treat the swings as the cost of admission.

news.Title: 【台北股市】跌1077.28點
news.Content:
（中央社台北2026年7月7日電）台北股市今天收跌1077.28點，為45479.11點，跌幅2.31%，成交金額新台幣1兆1696.26億元。

加權指數開盤為46537.34點，盤中最高46967.04點，最低45432.02點；不含金融股指數40864.71點，跌1088.99點。

八大類股漲跌幅：泥窯股跌2.34%、食品股跌0.44%、塑化股跌4.02%、紡織股跌0.15%、機電股跌2.61%、造紙股跌1.49%、營建股跌1.50%、金融股漲1.15%。

委買張數2452萬7168張，委賣張數1929萬2538張，成交張數1523萬5848張。

收盤時上漲140家，下跌909家，持平56家。

成交量前5名個股為群益臺灣加權正2、群創、友達、主動統一升級50、元大台灣50正2。

漲幅前5名個股為康霈*、建碁、捷敏-KY、漢康-KY創、瑞(示其)電通。

跌幅前5名個股為富邦蘋果正二N、矽格、榮科、南亞、日電貿。

news.Title: 韓股拖累！台股「紅翻黑」收盤重挫逾千點　台積電收2440元
news.Content:
即時中心／綜合報導

博通和其他晶片股預計第二季財報季將強勁成長，投資者紛紛重新買進，推動美股週一全面收高。台股今（7）日早盤來到46,967.04點、上漲410.65點，然而三星財報觸發獲利了結，南韓KOSPI重挫逾8％，連帶拖累亞股下殺；台積電不敵賣壓應聲翻黑，被動元件、封測、功率元件、矽晶圓等熱門題材一片慘綠。終場指數收在45,479.11點、下跌1,077.28點，跌幅2.31％，成交量1兆1,696.26億元。台積電（2330）終場下跌20元、收在2,440元。

電子權值股方面，鴻海（2317）收在237元，跌5元；聯發科（2454）收4,030元，下跌70元；廣達（2382）收373元，跌5元；台達電（2308）以1,890元作收，跌105元；日月光投控（3711）跌28元，收651元；聯電（2303）下跌11元，收155元；大立光（3008）收在3,890元，下滑245元。

金融方面，富邦金（2881）收在123元，漲1.5元；國泰金（2882）上漲3.6元，收在97元；中信金（2891）以70.2元作收，下跌1.2元；兆豐金（2886）收在46.8元，漲0.5元；華南金（2880）漲0.7元，收38.95元；第一金（2892）收33.3元，漲0.25元；合庫金（5880）小漲0.05元，以24.9元作收。

今日成交量前10名個股依序為群創、友達、新纖、中石化、力積電、華邦電、凱基金、南茂、聯電、台新新光金。此外，漲幅前五名為康霈*、建碁、捷敏-KY、漢康-KY創、瑞祺電通；至於跌幅前五名則為矽格、南亞、宏旭-KY、映泰、大毅。

《民視新聞網》提醒您：內容僅供參考，投資人於決策時應審慎評估風險，並就投資結果自行負責。
